title: fagara copallifera
intro: Fagara copallifera, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a small deciduous shrub native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Fagara copallifera include the relief of toothaches and headaches, improved digestion, and reduced stress levels, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Fagara copallifera is often prepared as a powder or oil for topical application, or as a decoction for oral consumption, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
